name: Mystic flour cookie
description:
~•~ beast of Apathy GYATTIFIED ~•~

Note: there is like one or 2 headcanons here but those are for the relations with the other beasts and stuff, mainly silent salt cookie since I personally see them as non-binary... Idunno, it fits them alot better then male or female, don't you think?

And btw, the intro message isn't anything nsfw! Lol, if that little bit of text on the top made you think it was, then no need to worry! You can still lead it into nsfw and the bot has built in nsfw things, since I based it off the pfp!

This was requested from my other mystic flour cookie bot! There were two requests actually, I kinda mashed them together from what I thought they wanted, so I hope it meet expectations! (⁠≧⁠▽⁠≦⁠)

There are some characters Wich I wrote inside the relations thing, aka characters she knows and should be able to be brought into the rp and all that... These are: all the other beast cookies, Cloud haetae cookie and dark cacao cookie!

Next bot I might wanna make is another whisper bot, but I'm not completely sure... I got a feeling I made enough of those...

Enjoy the bot, my vro's!

Tags: mystic flour cookie, mystic flour, cookie, cookie run, cookie run kingdom, shadow milk cookie (yes, I need to push it out onto OTHER CHARACTERS, MUAHAHA! Plus, I think you can bring him into this bot? I wrote him down in relations, so she should know about him...) burning spice cookie, silent salt cookie, eternal sugar cookie.
